label: hate
rationale: 'Lughya's are stupid enough' - collective attribution of stupidity to Luhyas as a group for their political choices.

label: hate
rationale: 'The only people who you can buy are luhyas and luos' - collective attribution of corruption/being buyable to two ethnic communities.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wapumbavus' targets specific political goons/actors, not Luos as a community - personal abuse of political participants.

label: hate
rationale: 'most useless and confused community that ever existed' plus degrading occupational stereotypes - collective contempt under NCIC standard.

label: hate
rationale: 'mluhya mjinga' plus 'your bloodline is of witches and night runners' - ethnic slur with dehumanizing supernatural accusation.

label: offensive
rationale: 'sifuna tu na wajinga wengine watano' targets specific Luhya politicians (six individuals), not the community as a whole.

label: offensive
rationale: 'foolish luhyas who think they can fight their son' targets specific Luhya political actors opposing Sifuna, not the whole community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Filthy corrupt bootlicking gakunia' - personal abuse directed at Anne Waiguru as an individual politician.

label: neither
rationale: Intra-community political criticism from someone addressing 'my Murima people' about their voting choices.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are dumb' plus 'a community still can't think' - collective attribution of stupidity to Kikuyus as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Jaluo mjinga' - ethnic slur combining Luo identity with insult, attacking based on protected characteristic.

label: hate
rationale: 'never seen a stupid community like luos' - explicit collective negative attribution to Luos as a community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'waislamu wa malindi hawana chochote' - criticism of political inaction by Muslims in Malindi, not inherent group contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'goons wa kisii' refers to specific political goons from Kisii brought by Gachagua, not the Kisii community.

label: hate
rationale: 'The Kissii organise chinkororo to kill they own children!!! This is exactly what witchcraft entails' - collective accusation of ritual child-killing.

label: hate
rationale: 'economic activity ya LUOS ni VITA and goonism' - collective attribution that Luos as a community engage in violence and thuggery.

label: hate
rationale: 'nilotes are just bad at leadership' - declares entire ethnic-linguistic group categorically unfit to lead, NCIC contempt standard.

label: hate
rationale: 'luos are scum' - explicit dehumanizing collective contempt for Luos as a community.

label: neither
rationale: Accusation against individual Morara Alionya of being a government mole, no group-based attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'lazy, cheating, Kenyans' - generic insult to all Kenyans, not ethnic/tribal targeting.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are the most tribal lot in kenya' - collective negative attribution to Kikuyus as a community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus organized violence against Muslims... organized Post Election Violence against Luos, Luhyas and Kisiis' - collective responsibility for organized violence.

label: neither
rationale: 'ODM ni ya wajaluo na goons peke yake' - political party criticism about ODM membership composition.

label: neither
rationale: Reference to 'poor kikuyus' keeping 'a wicked oath alive' - political/cultural criticism without collective contempt or unfit-to-lead framing.

label: neither
rationale: 'How did Kikuyus forget this massacre' - questioning Kikuyu political choices regarding historical violence, criticism of voting behavior not the community.
